task_description: Wire the QI web UI to use the authenticated backend API (Phase 2). Create api.js client module, add mode switching to store, implement login/register screen, add logout button, online mode toggle in settings, and connection status indicator. Default mode remains 'local' so existing offline functionality and all smoke tests continue to work unchanged.

verification.summary: All 3 test suites pass: smoke.js (199 assertions, 0 failures), test.js (7 suites PASS), api.test.js (54 assertions PASS). No build step needed (static files). Docker build skipped (no Dockerfile for qi-webapp). Review fixes applied: sync error handling, dead MFA code removed, robust fallback heuristic, MFA helper extracted.
